mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, description, is_system, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, code, description, is_system, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_role WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, name, code, description, is_system, is_enabled, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_role (id, name, code, description, is_system, is_enabled, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{isSystem}, #{isEnabled}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_role SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_role WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_role WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
